impact: This gives the supervisor deterministic diagnostics before retrying checkbox-35 or checkbox-37: reject syntactically invalid Python before running the full suite, spell comparison operators explicitly in prompts, and require mutation cases to mutate a copied fixture while keeping the committed fixture valid. That lets the worker resume autonomous progress without broadening scope or implementing the domain task inside the repair step.
summary: Replace the supervisor repair guide with narrow retry guardrails for recent PP&D daemon failures: malformed Python comparisons and mutation tests that accidentally invalidate the committed fixture.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-35: Recovery for checkbox-27e: after checkbox-27d passes, add one mutation case for out-of-range `confidence` only. Use only complete Python comparisons such as `if not isinstance(confidence, (int, float)):` and `if confidence > 1:`.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
